languages.text: "Ты сделал ценный вывод, а значит, этот эксперимент уже не прошел зря".
"You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."
languages.original_text: "Ты сделал ценный вывод, а значит, этот эксперимент уже не прошел зря".

traits.locale_text: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."
"You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."
"You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."

languages.text: 「何か貴重なものを学んだということは、この実験は無駄ではなかったということだね」
languages.original_text: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."

traits.locale_text: 「何か貴重なものを学んだということは、この実験は無駄ではなかったということですね。」

languages.text: “你汲取了宝贵的教训，这意味着实验没有白费。”
languages.original_text: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."

traits.locale_text: “你汲取了宝贵的教训，这意味着实验没有白费。”

languages.text: « Cette expérience n'était pas vaine, puisqu'elle vous a appris quelque chose d'important. »
languages.original_text: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."

traits.locale_text: « Cette expérience n'était pas vaine, puisqu'elle vous a appris quelque chose d'important. »

languages.text: «Ha descubierto algo de valor, lo que significa que el experimento no ha sido en vano».
languages.original_text: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."

traits.locale_text: «Ha descubierto algo de valor, lo que significa que el experimento no ha sido en vano».

languages.text: "Değerli bir şey öğrendin, bu da deneyin boşuna olmadığı anlamına gelir."
languages.original_text: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."

traits.locale_text: "Değerli bir şey öğrendin, bu da deneyin boşuna olmadığı anlamına gelir."

languages.text: "Ihr habt etwas Wertvolles gelernt. Dieses Experiment war also nicht umsonst."
languages.original_text: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt etwas Wertvolles gelernt. Dieses Experiment war also nicht umsonst."
